seoTitle: Milparinka vs Milroy — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Milparinka and Milroy. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Milparinka and Milroy.
heading: Milparinka vs Milroy — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Milparinka, New South Wales and Milroy, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Milroy has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Milparinka (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Milparinka or Milroy safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Milparinka has a flood risk score of 58/100, while Milroy scores 21/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Milparinka scores 60/100 for bushfire risk. Milroy scores 24/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Milparinka or Milroy?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Milroy has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.45% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
